content.json:
# IntelWatch ETIP - Threat Intelligence Workbook

This workbook provides visibility into IOCs ingested from IntelWatch ETIP, enrichment quality, detection matches, and feed health.

## IOC Overview

Summary of all threat intelligence indicators ingested from IntelWatch ETIP.

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or tostring(ThreatSeverity) == '{Severity}'
| summarize TotalIOCs = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId)
content.title: Total IOC Count

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or tostring(ThreatSeverity) == '{Severity}'
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1d)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: IOCs Ingested Over Time

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or tostring(ThreatSeverity) == '{Severity}'
| extend IOCType = case(
    isnotempty(NetworkIP), "IP",
    isnotempty(DomainName), "Domain",
    isnotempty(Url), "URL",
    isnotempty(FileHashValue), "Hash",
    isnotempty(EmailSenderAddress), "Email",
    "Other")
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by IOCType
content.title: Breakdown by Type

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by ThreatSeverity
content.title: Breakdown by Severity

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or tostring(ThreatSeverity) == '{Severity}'
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by TlpLevel
content.title: Breakdown by TLP

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where '{Severity}' == 'All' or tostring(ThreatSeverity) == '{Severity}'
| mv-expand Tags
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by tostring(Tags)
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10 Tags

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| mv-expand KillChainActions
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by tostring(KillChainActions)
| top 10 by Count
content.title: Top 10 MITRE ATT&CK Techniques

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where Active == true
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend AgeDays = datetime_diff('day', now(), todatetime(FirstReportedDateTime))
| extend AgeBucket = case(AgeDays <= 1, "< 1 day", AgeDays <= 7, "1-7 days", AgeDays <= 30, "8-30 days", "> 30 days")
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by AgeBucket
content.title: Feed Freshness (Age Distribution)

content.json:
## Enrichment & Risk Scores

Insights into IOC enrichment quality, confidence distribution, and enrichment sources.

content.query:
ETIP_Stats_CL
| top 1 by TimeGenerated
| project TotalIOCs = total_d, LastUpdated = lastUpdated_s
content.title: Latest ETIP Stats

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| extend ConfBucket = case(ConfidenceScore >= 90, "90-100", ConfidenceScore >= 70, "70-89", ConfidenceScore >= 50, "50-69", ConfidenceScore >= 30, "30-49", "0-29")
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by ConfBucket
content.title: Confidence Score Distribution

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Description contains "VirusTotal" or Description contains "AbuseIPDB" or Description contains "AI"
| extend Source = case(Description contains "VirusTotal", "VirusTotal", Description contains "AbuseIPDB", "AbuseIPDB", Description contains "AI", "AI Triage", "Other")
| summarize Count = dcount(ExternalIndicatorId) by Source
content.title: Enrichment Sources

content.json:
## Detection & Matching

IOC match rates against security logs, top matched indicators, and unmatched high-confidence IOCs for threat hunting.

content.title: IOC Match Rate

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| join kind=inner (SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.CompromisedEntity
| summarize AlertCount = count() by IndicatorId = ExternalIndicatorId, IndicatorValue = coalesce(NetworkIP, DomainName, Url, FileHashValue)
| top 10 by AlertCount
content.title: Top Matched IOCs

content.query:
ThreatIntelligenceIndicator
| where SourceSystem == "IntelWatch ETIP"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where ConfidenceScore >= 80
| where Active == true
| join kind=leftanti (SecurityAlert | where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}) on $left.NetworkIP == $right.CompromisedEntity
| project ExternalIndicatorId, IndicatorValue = coalesce(NetworkIP, DomainName, Url, FileHashValue), ConfidenceScore, ThreatSeverity, TimeGenerated
| top 20 by ConfidenceScore desc
content.title: Unmatched High-Confidence IOCs

content.json:
## Feed Health

Monitoring ingestion rates, sync freshness, and error rates for the ETIP data connector.

content.query:
ETIP_Stats_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| summarize IOCCount = max(total_d) by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Ingestion Rate

content.query:
ETIP_Stats_CL
| top 1 by TimeGenerated
| extend StalenessMinutes = datetime_diff('minute', now(), TimeGenerated)
| extend Status = iff(StalenessMinutes > 120, "⚠️ STALE", "✅ Healthy")
| project LastSync = TimeGenerated, StalenessMinutes, Status
content.title: Last Sync Status

content.query:
FunctionAppLogs
| where FunctionName == "syncIndicators"
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where Level == "Error"
| summarize ErrorCount = count() by bin(TimeGenerated, 1h)
| order by TimeGenerated asc
content.title: Error Rate
